ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no other enrichment

ingredients_text: Tomato pulp (76%), mushrooms (10%), tomato paste (6.5%), water (4%), olive oil (1.5%), salt (0.7%), garlic (0,5%),white wine (0.3%), basil (0,3%), parsley (0.16%), rosemary (0.01%), natural aroma (0.03%).
